---
title: "Keyboard shortcuts"
---

ACE is designed for keyboard-driven coding. Shortcuts depend on where focus is: the source text or the codebook.

## Source text

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `1` to `9`, `0`, `a` to `y` | Apply visible codes |
| `Up` / `Down` | Move between sentences |
| `Shift+Left` / `Shift+Right` | Move between sources |
| `Q` | Repeat the last code |
| `Z` or `Command+Z` | Undo |
| `Command+Shift+Z` | Redo |
| `X` | Delete annotation |
| `Shift+F` | Toggle flag |
| `N` | Open, edit, or close source notes |
| `/` | Search codes |
| `Tab` | Cycle between coding zones |

## Codebook

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `Option+Right` | Move focused code into the folder above |
| `Option+Shift+Right` | Create a folder from the focused code and code above |
| `Option+Left` | Move focused code out to the root |
| `Option+Shift+Up` / `Option+Shift+Down` | Reorder folder rows |
| `Command+X` | Cut code |
| `Command+V` | Paste code |
| `F2` | Rename |
| `Delete` / `Backspace` | Soft-delete |
| `Esc` | Clear cut, clear search, or return focus to source |

## Search commands

| Command | Action |
|---|---|
| `/code Name` | Create or search for a code |
| `/folder Name` | Create or search for a folder |
